COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-31-2022 - CONTINUED TO AUG-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN 514 FOR COURT TRIAL/PROVE-UP HEARING AT THE REQUEST OF MASON ARIA, ESQ., WHO WAS PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK. EVIN CULP, VENDOR ANALYST AND CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS FOR PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH, BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. BOTH MESSRS. ARIA AND CULP APPEARED VIA ZOOM FOR THIS MORNING'S HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOHN T. HENRY, BUT MR. ARIA INFORMS THE COURT THAT MR. HENRY HAS BEEN MAKING MONTHLY PAYMENTS AND SHOULD BE PAID IN FULL BY AUGUST, 2022. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 10:35 A.M. AND CONCLUDING AT 10:44 A.M. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)
